Create Factor Computation Optimized

Source: R/table1.R
create_factor_computation.Rd

Creates optimized computation expression for factor statistics.

Usage

create_factor_computation(grp_var, group_level, data)

Arguments

grp_var

Grouping variable name

group_level

Group level value

data

Data frame (for group size calculation)

Value

Computation expression

On this page
